Bash(# Copy project files \(excluding .git and node_modules\)
cp /c/Projects/pos-app-init/package.json /c/Projects/pos-app/
cp /c/Projects/pos-app-init/package-lock.json /c/Projects/pos-app/
cp /c/Projects/pos-app-init/tsconfig.json /c/Projects/pos-app/
cp /c/Projects/pos-app-init/next.config.ts /c/Projects/pos-app/
cp /c/Projects/pos-app-init/next-env.d.ts /c/Projects/pos-app/
cp /c/Projects/pos-app-init/eslint.config.mjs /c/Projects/pos-app/
cp /c/Projects/pos-app-init/postcss.config.mjs /c/Projects/pos-app/
cp -r /c/Projects/pos-app-init/src /c/Projects/pos-app/
cp -r /c/Projects/pos-app-init/public /c/Projects/pos-app/
echo "Done copying")
